summary: Video. Night-time coverage of Trump stepping off Air Force One in Beijing and being greeted on the tarmac by Chinese officials and a crowd before heading to his motorcade. It is continuous footage of a single arrival event with an ambient music bed (music_score 0.86) and no montage editing, overlays, or stylized editing.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS steps off Air Force One in Beijing ahead of his historic Summit this week. He is greeted on the tarmac by Chinese Vice President Hang Zhang, @USAmbChina, and other dignitaries.'
